title: Manage wool harvesting staff
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Manage wool harvesting staff demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Communicate workplace requirements to wool harvesting staff

pcs.text: Establish performance standards for clip preparation and communicate to individuals and the team
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Establish performance standards for clip preparation and communicate to individuals and the team?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Establish performance standards for clip preparation and communicate to individuals and the team.

pcs.text: Explain skirting requirements and monitor skirtings level
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Explain skirting requirements and monitor skirtings level?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Explain skirting requirements and monitor skirtings level.

pcs.text: Describe the requirements for separating specific parts of the fleece to wool handlers using the industry code of practice and processor requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Describe the requirements for separating specific parts of the fleece to wool handlers using the industry code of practice and processor requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Describe the requirements for separating specific parts of the fleece to wool handlers using the industry code of practice and processor requirements.

pcs.text: Explain the importance of wool traceability and relevant quality standards
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Explain the importance of wool traceability and relevant quality standards?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Explain the importance of wool traceability and relevant quality standards.

pcs.text: Use motivation strategies for wool harvesting staff to maintain a consistent focus on clip preparation standards and timing of operations
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Use motivation strategies for wool harvesting staff to maintain a consistent focus on clip preparation standards and timing of operations?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Use motivation strategies for wool harvesting staff to maintain a consistent focus on clip preparation standards and timing of operations.

pcs.text: Monitor adherence to work health and safety (WHS), the use of personal protective equipment (PPE) and fair work procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Monitor adherence to work health and safety (WHS), the use of personal protective equipment (PPE) and fair work procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Monitor adherence to work health and safety (WHS), the use of personal protective equipment (PPE) and fair work procedures.

pcs.text: Monitor implementation of animal welfare policies to staff
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Monitor implementation of animal welfare policies to staff?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Monitor implementation of animal welfare policies to staff.

pcs.text: Monitor the implementation of the workplace’s biosecurity and environment policy and procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Monitor the implementation of the workplace’s biosecurity and environment policy and procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Monitor the implementation of the workplace’s biosecurity and environment policy and procedures.
